competitors.name: Cursor
fetched_urls: WebSearch:Cursor IDE changelog June 18 19 20 2026 new feature
WebSearch:"Cursor Automations" "/automate" always-on agents Slack GitHub trigger announcement
competitors.raw_snapshot: HN Algolia API与cursor.com/changelog、cursor.com/blog/automations本次直连均403，转WebSearch。核心新发现：Cursor 3.8（约6月18-19日）上线Automations——always-on agent，可由schedule或Slack/Linear/GitHub/PagerDuty/webhook等跨工具事件触发；新增/automate skill，可在本地agent session内用自然语言描述任务，Cursor自动配置好triggers/instructions/tools；agent被触发后会起一个云端sandbox执行任务，并带memory tool供跨次运行学习改进；同期新增computer use工具供云端agent产出demo/artifact。另有Design Mode（可在canvas中选中标注UI元素指导Cursor编辑）与context usage report（canvas内交互式展示token去向）等canvas相关增量更新。直连官方域名两次均403，未能核实原文逐句及确切版本号。
competitors.content_hash: HN Algolia API与cursor.com/changelog、cursor.com/blog/automations本次直连均403，转WebSearch。核心新发现：Cursor 3.8（约6月18-19日）上线Automations——always-on agent，可由schedule或Slack/Linear/GitHub

changes.description: Cursor 3.8上线Automations：always-on agent，可由schedule或Slack/Linear/GitHub/PagerDuty/webhook等跨工具事件触发，自动起云端sandbox执行任务，带memory tool跨次运行学习改进。
changes.evidence: 「Automations run on schedules or are triggered by events from Slack, Linear, GitHub, PagerDuty, and webhooks.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点1+5：always-on agent持续在后台运行、由跨工具事件触发，不需要人每次主动唤起，逼近meee2「peripheral常驻」方向，但仍是Cursor自身工具内的agent，未见人作为协同节点嵌入同一协议

changes.description: /automate skill：可在本地agent session内用自然语言描述任务，由Cursor自动配置好triggers/instructions/tools生成automation。
changes.evidence: 「Describe the task you want to automate in plain language and Cursor will configure the triggers, instructions, and tools for you.」

key_findings: HN Algolia与cursor.com/changelog、blog本次仍均403，结论基于多次WebSearch交叉确认
Cursor 3.8 Automations是本轮crit竞品中最值得关注的新动态：always-on+跨工具事件触发的agent，与baseline的/in-cloud（人继续本地工作+云端subagent并行）形成互补——前者是完全自动触发后台运行，后者是人主动并行操作

competitors.name: Linear
fetched_urls: WebSearch:Linear app changelog new feature June 18 19 20 2026
WebSearch:Linear "Write with Agent" project updates Slack issues documents discussions quote
competitors.raw_snapshot: linear.app/changelog与HN Algolia本次仍403，转WebSearch。发现baseline之后(6/18)新发布：Agent-Assisted Project Updates——写project/initiative更新时新增'Write with Agent'，agent会review自上次更新以来issues/documents/discussions的变化，并检查关联Slack频道的消息，生成草稿供人refine后发布。这是继此前Coding Sessions（6/11）之后的新功能，把跨工具(issues+docs+discussions+Slack)信息汇总进单一草稿的能力首次明确出现。同日还有Desktop Tabs导航改进（各tab独立history stack），非结构性变化。
competitors.content_hash: linear.app/changelog与HN Algolia本次仍403，转WebSearch。发现baseline之后(6/18)新发布：Agent-Assisted Project Updates——写project/initiative更新时新增'Write with Agent'，agent会revi

changes.description: Linear新增'Write with Agent'：写project/initiative更新时，agent自动review自上次更新以来的issues/documents/discussions变化并检查关联Slack频道消息，生成草稿供人编辑后发布。
changes.evidence: 「The agent reviews changes made since the last update, checks messages in the linked Slack channel, and writes an update draft for you to refine.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点4：跨工具(issues+docs+discussions+Slack)信息自动汇总成单一可编辑草稿，与meee2「跨工具artifact pull」结构高度相关，是本次报告中对锚点4最直接的对标案例之一

key_findings: linear.app/changelog直连本次仍403，证据基于WebSearch转述
'Write with Agent'是本轮新发现中与meee2锚点4最贴近的案例：人发起、agent跨多个工具/频道拉取信息生成草稿、人最终编辑发布——已具备'人在回路中'+跨工具pull的雏形

competitors.content_hash: Tier1（App Store lookup/HN Algolia）本次仍全部403，转WebSearch。发现baseline之后明确带日期的新发布：Slackbot MCP Client（6月18日官方公告）——开发者可将MCP server接入Slack，Slackbot自动发现

changes.description: Slackbot MCP Client（6/18发布）：可接入任意第三方MCP server，Slackbot自动发现工具并按对话prompt调用，借此可路由查询到Salesforce生态6000+应用或组织指定的任意第三方工具。
changes.evidence: 「Slackbot can now route user queries directly to Agentforce, as well as over 6,000 apps within the Salesforce ecosystem or any third-party tool an organization chooses.」

competitors.name: Product Hunt AI 新品雷达
fetched_urls: WebSearch:new AI workspace productivity tool launch 2026 site:producthunt.com
WebSearch:MeshPilot Product Hunt AI workspace terminals tasks agents persistent memory sessions
WebSearch:Elvin Product Hunt proactive AI coordination messages meetings docs draft approve
competitors.raw_snapshot: PH feed与HN Algolia本次仍均403，转WebSearch兜底。今日检索到的AI新品中两款命中≥2个watch_keywords：1) MeshPilot——'AI workspace for terminals, tasks, and agents'，集terminal/visual canvas/task board于一体，'let AI agents run real tasks, and keep persistent memory so your context carries across sessions'，命中workspace+canvas+agent+session共4个关键词，结构重叠度本轮最高，建议加入sources.json持续追踪。2) Elvin——'Proactive AI that finds and finishes work before you ask'，watches inbox/calendar/messages生成draft，'asks before taking action'需人approve，命中agent+human-AI共2个关键词。此外Kanwas（已于上次报告记录，本次无新动态）、Prism/illumi/Alpine等仅命中0-1个关键词，未达标准。
competitors.content_hash: PH feed与HN Algolia本次仍均403，转WebSearch兜底。今日检索到的AI新品中两款命中≥2个watch_keywords：1) MeshPilot——'AI workspace for terminals, tasks, and agents'，集terminal/visual canvas/task

changes.description: MeshPilot：AI workspace集terminal/canvas/task board一体，AI agent可执行真实任务，并通过persistent memory让上下文跨session延续。命中4个watch_keywords（workspace/canvas/agent/session），本轮匹配度最高，建议加入sources.json。
changes.evidence: 「let AI agents run real tasks, and keep persistent memory so your context carries across sessions instead of starting cold every time」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点1+4：人与CLI agent在同一terminal session中协作+跨session记忆延续，与meee2'人在agent图内'及跨session一致性有结构相关性，但目前限定在单一开发者工具内，未见跨owner/跨工具的pull

changes.description: Elvin：proactive AI监控inbox/calendar/messages，自动生成draft/follow-up，需人approve才执行。命中agent+human-AI共2个关键词。
changes.evidence: 「Elvin watches your inbox, calendar, and messages, finds what needs doing, and drafts it before you ask」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点1：人仍是决策节点（approve/reject），AI主动起草——与meee2'人在agent图内'方向接近，但是单点助理而非workspace/canvas范式

key_findings: PH官方feed与HN本次仍均403，证据来自WebSearch
MeshPilot是本轮发现中结构重叠度最高的新品（4/11关键词命中），建议下次加入sources.json正式追踪
Kanwas（上次记录的候选）本次未发现新动态

alerts.headline: Cursor 3.8上线Automations：always-on agent可由schedule或跨工具事件(Slack/GitHub/Linear/PagerDuty/webhook)触发，带memory tool跨次学习
alerts.evidence: 「Automations run on schedules or are triggered by events from Slack, Linear, GitHub, PagerDuty, and webhooks.」
alerts.action_suggestion: 评估meee2'peripheral常驻+人在场协同'叙事相对于Cursor'后台always-on+跨工具事件触发但人不必在场'模式的差异化是否依然清晰；建议下次直连cursor.com/automations核实完整功能与限制

alerts.headline: Linear新增'Write with Agent'：agent跨issues/documents/discussions/Slack自动汇总变化生成项目更新草稿，人编辑后发布
alerts.evidence: 「The agent reviews changes made since the last update, checks messages in the linked Slack channel, and writes an update draft for you to refine.」
alerts.action_suggestion: 这是迄今对meee2锚点4(跨工具artifact pull)最直接的对标案例之一，建议评估meee2跨工具pull能力相对于Linear这一'限定在issues+docs+Slack范围内'实现的差异化（如是否支持更广泛/任意工具、是否是live link而非一次性草稿生成）
